chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4496 of 2023 [Mahmood Zamir Farooqui v. Federation of Pakistan and 04 others] ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Present: Justice Mohammad Karim Khan Agha Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon 1. For hearing of Misc. No.20796/2023 2. For hearing of main case 03.10.2025 Mr. Faizan Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner alongwith petitioner Mr. Talha Abbasi, advocate for the respondent-PQA Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General --------- Mohammad Karim Khan Agha, J. The main grievance of the petitioner is that he is not being sent for Departmental Training for promotion to BPS-20, in accordance with the law. 2. Learned counsel for the respondent / Port Qasim Authority (`PQA`) states that at least one inquiry is pending against the petitioner. Learned counsel for PQA further states that all the inquiries pending against the petitioner will be completed within months of the date of this order, in accordance with the law and in the event the petitioner is exonerated from such inquiries, he will be sent for Departmental Training for promotion to BPS-20 at the earliest. Likewise his promotion may be considered in accordance with the law. 3. The petitioner present in Court states that he is satisfied with such proposition. Order accordingly. The petitioner shall ensure that he fully cooperates with the inquiry proceedings so that there is no undue delay. 4. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chairman, PQA, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s).
A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chairman, PQA, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
